Items.Title: Oversight - Evaluation of DYCD’s Beacon and Cornerstone Programs.
Items.ActionText: This Oversight was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Oversight - Evaluation of DYCD’s Beacon and Cornerstone Programs.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass and the Governor to sign legislation setting aside a portion of state revenues from sports betting to support youth sports programs, upgrade community sports infrastructure and expand access to recreational athletics for young people across the state
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Setting aside a portion of state revenues from sports betting to support youth sports programs, upgrade community sports infrastructure and expand access to recreational athletics for young people.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, legislation to establish the Center for Fatherhood Initiatives under the Office of Children and Family Services
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Establish the Center for Fatherhood Initiatives under the Office of Children and Family Services.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, A.7415 and a Senate companion bill, which would establish a baby bond pilot program for foster youth
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Establish a baby bond pilot program for foster youth. (A.7415)

Items.Title: Resolution calling upon the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, the Predatory Marketing Prevention Act (S7487C), which relates to false or misleading advertisements of food and food products; provides factors to determine whether an advertisement is false or misleading; provides for enforcement and a private right of action
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee

Items.Title: Resolution calling on Congress to pass, and the President to sign, legislation that creates targeted and means-tested guaranteed income programs for low-income individuals, young adults, and foster youth
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Creates targeted and means-tested guaranteed income programs for low-income individuals, young adults, and foster youth.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on Congress to pass, and the President to sign, S.441/HR 1041, also known as the American Opportunity Accounts Act, which would create a federally funded savings account for every American child
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee

Items.Title: Resolution calling upon New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, legislation that would deposit $1,000 into an account that is managed and invested by the state comptroller to be available to eligible children when they reach the age of 18
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Deposit $1,000 into an account that is managed and invested by the state comptroller to be available to eligible children when they reach the age of 18.
